_note: Stryker mutation testing baseline for src/engine/pipeline/. Two independent blockers prevented capture: (1) under greywall, Stryker's worker IPC raises EPERM on internalConnectMultiple because the sandbox blocks TCP localhost binds Stryker uses for child-proxy IPC; (2) outside greywall, Stryker's dry-run fails because vitest's default `pool: 'threads'` rejects the `process.chdir()` calls in src/commands/__tests__/*.test.ts when Stryker's `coverageAnalysis: 'perTest'` instruments the run. Phase 10 added vitest.stryker.config.ts (pool: 'forks') and stryker.baseline.config.mjs to address blocker (2); blocker (1) remains unresolved under sandbox and requires running on the host outside greywall. To regenerate: `npx stryker run stryker.baseline.config.mjs && node scripts/phase-10-record-baseline.mjs .check/mutation.pipeline-baseline.json`.

_phase8_assertion: Phase 8/10 must compare the recorded score (when populated) against the post-migration mutation score on src/engine/{flows,atoms,composites,adapters}/**/*.ts. The post-migration score must be >= the score captured here.

_phase_10_attempts.details: Phase 10 retried Stryker capture under the active greywall sandbox using stryker.baseline.config.mjs + vitest.stryker.config.ts (pool: 'forks'). Same EPERM on Stryker's logging-server connect — the workaround handles vitest worker IPC but not Stryker core's TCP-localhost logging-server. See .ridgeline/builds/fascicle-migration/phase-10-stryker-environment.md.
